title: NPP Request Email/SMS Sequence
summary: Sends paperwork requests by email and SMS once approval is received, with language-aware branching.
businessOutcome: Move clients from approval to completed intake faster without staff manually chasing documents.
thumbnail: Approved leads get the right paperwork request instantly.
problem: Paperwork collection slows down when approved leads wait for manual outreach or receive the wrong message.
solution: The workflow reacts to approval events, applies the right tag, removes conflicts, and sends the correct English or Spanish request sequence automatically.
workflowOverview: Normalizes the contact into the correct workflow state
Sends the right multilingual SMS and email request
audience: Client intake teams, healthcare and legal operations
